**Files containing at least one `ScopeStrategy::<Variant>` token:**

  All four variants appear here in the `resolve` function's `match` expression:
  `ScopeStrategy::WorkspaceOnly`, `ScopeStrategy::GlobalOnly`, `ScopeStrategy::WorkspaceReplaces`, `ScopeStrategy::MergeByKey`.

- `crates/orbit-store/src/backend/file_backends.rs`
  `TaskFileStore::strategy` returns `ScopeStrategy::WorkspaceOnly`.

- `crates/orbit-store/src/backend/sqlite_backends.rs`
  `SqliteAuditEventStoreBackend::strategy` returns `ScopeStrategy::GlobalOnly`.

- `crates/orbit-store/src/file/skill_store.rs`
  `SkillCatalog::strategy` (the `ScopedStore<LoadedSkill>` impl) returns `ScopeStrategy::WorkspaceReplaces`.
